case_title: WAI-ON LIU VS. ERIC F. BRITTON et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION; DECLARATION; POS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, WAI-ON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, WAI-ON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRITTON, DARI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 12A NEPTUNE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $3,200.00 RENT, $825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $327.30 COSTS, $1,500.00 DAMAGES FOR THE PERIOD FROM 1/1/04 THROUGH 1/31/04, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,852.30, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, WAI-ON AS TO DEFENDANT BRITTON, ERIC F. BRITTON, DARI DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
